entries.title: St. Jerome, Commentary on Daniel, CHAPTER TWO on daniel 2:43
entries.excerpt: But its feet and toes are partly of iron and partly of earthenware, a fact most clearly demonstrated at the present time. For just as there was at the first nothing stronger or hardier than the Roman realm, so also in these last days there is nothing more feeble, since we require the assistance of barbarian tribes both in our civil wars and against foreign nations.
